descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

Base DMG caused by "24" increases by [Arg3]%, and Final DMG to "Sculptors' Association" enemies increases by [Arg4]%.

For every 1% Sigil Yield Agrippa and her equipped WoD & Covenant have, the Base Shield of {Pale Blessing} increases by 0.5%, and Base {Poison} increases by 1%.

For every 1 Realm Mastery provided by Casiah and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant, {Magic Carnival} increases all of Casiah's Base DMG by 0.2%.

This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.

Playing {Onyx Plume} for the first time each turn inflicts 840% of Castor's ATK as {Corrosion} on the target and grants 10 Aliemus.
For every 1% DMG Amplification that Castor has, the Base amount of {Corrosion} inflicted increases by 1%.
After the battle, {Corrosion} inflicted by Castor permanently increases by 20% during this Exploration.
{Corrosion} inflicted in Boss Battles doubles.
After inflicting {Corrosion}, Castor's DMG output increases by 5% of the amount of {Corrosion} inflicted this turn.
DMG dealt by Castor does not remove {Corrosion}.
Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.

This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.

After Celeste plays a Command Card, trigger 1 Tentacle to attack the enemy. For every 1 Realm Mastery Celeste or her Wheel of Destiny and Covenant, this activation deals an additional 0.5% {Tentacle DMG}.

Clementine's Command Card gains 1 stack of {Symbiosis} after dealing Damage.
Each 1 Keyflare Regen attribute provided by Clementine and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant increases Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG by 0.35%.
At the start of the {Ultra Round}, remove all enemies' {Psychic Trauma} and {Phobic Fixation}. For each stack of {Psychic Trauma} removed from all enemies, gain 50 Keyflare; for each stack of {Phobic Fixation} removed from all enemies, other Awakeners gain 2 Aliemus.
Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

At the start of Boss Battles, gain {Death Resistance} equal to [Arg3]% of Horla's {Death Resistance} attribute. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, the corresponding {Emotion} effect of {Resplendent Chapters} +[Arg4]% until turn end.

Horla's "Strike" and "Defend" Command Cards are treated as Psalms.
When Horla's Command Cards trigger their {Leap} Effect, she enters the {Emotion} state associated with that Psalm. Horla can only have one {Emotion} state active at a time, and triggering a different Psalm's {Leap} Effect will change the {Emotion} state to the corresponding {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} has a team-wide passive buff that is active while Horla remains in that {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} state enhances a different effect of Horla's Exalt. The {Emotion} state persists throughout the exploration.
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Horla has, the passive effect value of Horla's current {Emotion} state increases by 0.1% of the original value.
For every 1% Crit. Rate provided by Jenkin and her equipped Wheel of Destiny & Covenant, the Base DMG of {Strike} and {Get 'em! Brown!} increases by 2%.

{Fiamma}'s buff effects +[Arg3]%. After each turn starts and before the discard cards phase, clear all {Burn} from cards in hand. Kathigu-Ra gains 1 stack of {Combust} for each stack of {Burn} cleared.

{Divine Realm: Tentacle Stance} features the following new effects:
{Divine Realm: Tranquil Sea}: Immediately generate Shield equal to 25% Max HP, and Tentacles will no longer attack at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
{Divine Realm: Raging Waves}: {Tentacle DMG} × 125% for the turn; after dealing Active DMG, 1 Tentacle attacks; lose 1 Tentacle at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
Realm Mastery is counted as Divine Realm: {Aequor} Mastery:
Each point provides: {Tranquil Sea} Stance's Shield Generation +0.025% Max HP. {Raging Waves} Stance's {Tentacle DMG} +0.025%. Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners.

When Arachne is in the team, the {Ultra} Realm reweaves into {Singularity: Ultra}.
{Dimension Shuttle}: After playing the first Command Card each turn, move a Temporary Base Copy of it to {Ultra Space}. Grant the original and the copy 25 stacks of {Singularity Beacon}. This cannot trigger during {Ultra} Rounds.
{Singularity Beacon}: Each stack increases Final DMG, {STR}/{Tentacle DMG} Generation, and Fixed {Poison}/{Counter} effects by 2%. Increases Final Shield, HP Recovery, and {STR⯆} effects by 1%. Removed after play. Cards with this effect cannot trigger {Dimension Shuttle}.
{Ultra Space}: When full, ending the turn activates {Ultra Space} immediately instead of initiating an {Ultra Round}: Discard all non-{Retain} cards, trigger their {Fleeting} effects, draw all {Ultra Space} cards, and set Arithmetica to 5. This current turn is treated as an {Ultra Round}.
{Singularity Annihilation}: Draw the leftmost card from {Ultra Space}. 3 turns cooldown.
Upon starting exploration, the team gains +50% DMG Amplification and 15 stacks of {Singularity Prism}.
{Singularity Prism}: All Command Cards gain {Singularity Beacon} bonuses equal to these stacks.
{Ultra} Mastery: For each 1 point of Realm Mastery, {Singularity Beacon} stacks from {Singularity Prism} and {Dimension Shuttle} increase by 0.05%.
Pure {Ultra}: If the team consists only of {Ultra} or {Chaos} Awakeners, the {Ultra} Mastery effect and Realm DMG Amplification are doubled.
